demo_2
astdump.translated: Program { statements: [ Viz( VizStatement { target: Relation( RelationRef { name: [ Name( "foo", ), ], inherit: true, }, ), components: [ VizComponent { component_type: Some( SPEC, ), type_modifiers: 0, extra: Some( Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_POSITION", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_ROW", value: Expression( StringRef( "0", ), ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_COLUMN", value: Expression( StringRef( "0", ), ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_WIDTH", value: Expression( StringRef( "6", ), ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_HEIGHT", value: Expression( StringRef( "4", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_TITLE", value: Expression( StringRef( "'Line Chart'", ), ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_ENCODING", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_X", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_AXIS", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_TICK_COUNT", value: Expression( StringRef( "10", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_FIELD", value: Expression( StringRef( "'x'", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_Y", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_AXIS", value: Object( [ DsonField { key: "DSON_TICK_COUNT", value: Expression( StringRef( "10", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_FIELD", value: Expression( StringRef( "'y'", ), ), }, ], ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: "DSON_MARK", value: Expression( StringRef( "'line'", ), ), }, ], ), ), }, ], }, ), ], }
